# MySQL Operations Submodule (Chinese Source)

> English llms.txt for files under `docs/zh/mysql/operations`.

## Docs

- [Operations Overview](../operations.mdx): Root-level topic overview for release checks, observability, backup, and incident handling.
- [Operations Runbook](./runbook.mdx): Production checklists, recovery validation, and post-incident review patterns.
- [Operations Sidebar Metadata](./_meta.json): Navigation metadata for the operations submodule.
- [This LLMs File](./llms.txt): Machine-readable index for this operations directory.
